posts.author: dlucha (david)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m trying to pull data from another board in Monday.com, but I only want to retrieve specific entries. For example, I have a “Contacts” board that contains both clients and suppliers. I would like to display only the suppliers on a different board.

I know how to link boards and pull data, but I haven’t found a way to filter and show only certain items (e.g., just the suppliers). Is there a way to achieve this using filters, mirror columns, or any other functionality in Monday.com?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dlucha - sadly pre-filtering connect board columns is not available functionality within monday at the moment.

The data would need to be split into multiple boards in order to acheive this.

Wish I had better news!
Mark
